articles.title: Roku OS’s home screen now features a large, permanent ad - Ars Technica
articles.description: “I don't want recommendations! I know what I want to watch."

articles.author: Jackson Payne
articles.title: NCAA denies Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby’s request for 2026 eligibility - Deseret News
articles.description: Brendan Sorsby, who has been receiving treatment for gambling addition, transferred to Texas Tech from Cincinnati this past offseason
articles.content:
The NCAA has denied Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsbys request for reinstatement this season, according to a Tuesday report from Pete Thamel of ESPN.
Sorsby was previously ruled permanently inel… [+1558 chars]
